summary_ja: Notion Token Town podcast (Latent Space)のスクレーパー重複5件。本文は同一エピソード（post_id=194195821）。既にentities/notion.md、simon-last.md、sarah-sachs.mdにコンテンツ取り込み済み。全件skip。

decisions.title: Notion's Token Town: 5 Rebuilds, 100+ Tools, MCP vs CLIs and the Software Factory Future - Simon Last & Sarah Sachs of Notion
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★★★ コンテンツ自体は高品質だが、既にentities/notion.md（NotionのAIプラットフォーム）、entities/simon-last.md（エージェントハーネス設計）、entities/sarah-sachs.md（3層評価フレームワーク）、concepts/harness-engineering.md、concepts/ai-evals.md、concepts/agent-architecture-decomposition.mdに取り込み済み。本文は1,585行のポッドキャストトランスクリプトで、Notion Custom Agentsの4-5回の再構築、Agent Labテーゼ、3層評価（回帰テスト→ローンチ品質→フロンティア30%パス）、Model Behavior Engineer役割、CLI vs MCP、ソフトウェア工場ビジョンを網羅。2026-05-20のraw-backlog-ingestで処理済み。
decisions.body_excerpt:
Notion's Token Town: 5 Rebuilds, 100+ Tools, MCP vs CLIs and the Software Factory Future - Simon Last & Sarah Sachs of Notion
Source: https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1084089&post_id=194195821...
Notion, the knowledge work decacorn, has been building AI tooling since before ChatGPT... Sarah Sachs and Simon Last of Notion join us for a deep dive into how Notion built Custom Agents, why it took years and multiple rebuilds to get right...
We discuss: Sarah and Simon's path to launching Notion Custom Agents, and why the feature was rebuilt four or five times before it was ready for production. Why early agent attempts failed: no tool-calling standard, short context windows, unreliable models...
